options.name: <port_or_pin_list>
options.description: Specifies a single or multiple pins or ports for which the input delay is reset

options.name: -clock_fall
options.description: Removes the assertions for the delay that is relative to the falling edge of the clock

options.name: -fall
options.description: Resets the input delay for the falling edge at the input port

options.name: -level_sensitive
options.description: Resets input delay that is launched by a positive level sensitive latch

options.name: -max
options.description: Removes the delay assertions that refer to the setup analysis

options.name: -min
options.description: Removes the delay assertions that refer to the hold analysis

options.name: -rise
options.description: Resets the input delay for the rising edge at the input port
